events.summary: OpenAI's Codex changelog for ChatGPT iOS 1.2026.153 records Codex Mobile support for branch/worktree setup, environment setup scripts, goal management, inline review comments, side chat from transcript selection, prompt editing, and usage/token activity views.
events.title: OpenAI Added Codex Mobile Worktree, Goal, And Review Controls

events.summary: OpenAI's Codex CLI 0.139 changelog records standalone web search support in code mode, richer tool/connector schema preservation, expanded local diagnostics, plugin marketplace JSON/source metadata, and fixes for resume/fork prompts, MCP startup warnings, image edits, and URL handling.
events.title: OpenAI Codex CLI Added Web Search, Schema, And Plugin Marketplace Updates

events.summary: OpenAI's Codex changelog for app version 26.608 records new migration flows from Claude Code and Claude Cowork setup, a revamped plugin management screen, broader settings search, and several workflow reliability fixes.
events.title: OpenAI Codex App Added Migration, Plugin, And Settings Improvements

events.summary: OpenAI's Codex CLI 0.138 changelog records CLI-to-desktop app handoff, saved image file-path exposure, model-defined reasoning effort ordering, account token usage reads for app-server integrations, v2 personal access token support, and richer structured plugin command output.
events.title: OpenAI Codex CLI Added App Handoff, PAT, And Plugin JSON Contracts

events.summary: OpenAI's Codex CLI 0.137 changelog records expanded terminal controls, monthly credit-limit and cloud-managed config support for enterprise/admin flows, app-server v2 controller grant RPCs, plugin JSON/catalog improvements, hosted web and image tools in more code-mode flows, multi-agent v2 runtime metadata, and multiple reliability fixes.
events.title: OpenAI Codex CLI Added Admin Config, Controller RPCs, Hosted Tools, And Multi-Agent Updates

events.summary: OpenAI's Codex app 26.602 changelog records profile activity insights/share cards, Computer Use startup readiness and appshot error-reporting improvements, browser/review UI fixes, expanded onboarding role choices, and a fix for configuration writes after plugin installation.
events.title: OpenAI Codex App Improved Computer Use Startup And Plugin Config Writes

events.summary: OpenAI added moderation-score output support to Responses API and Chat Completions generation requests, letting callers request moderation results for both input and generated output in the same response path.
events.title: OpenAI Added Moderation Scores To Generation API Responses

events.summary: OpenAI status recorded a resolved degraded-performance incident where Image API requests returned 401 errors, affecting API users during the incident window.
events.title: OpenAI Image API Requests Returned 401 Errors

events.summary: OpenAI status recorded a resolved degraded-performance incident for increased Codex compaction latency affecting a subset of users.
events.title: OpenAI Codex Compaction Had Increased Latency

events.summary: OpenAI changed eligible API container sessions from full-session minimum billing to per-minute billing with a shorter minimum, reducing effective cost for shorter eligible sessions.
events.title: OpenAI Changed Eligible Container Sessions To Per-Minute Billing

events.summary: OpenAI's deprecations page records older GPT Image model IDs as deprecated, with API removal scheduled for December 1, 2026 and GPT Image 2 listed as the replacement target.
events.title: OpenAI Deprecated Older GPT Image Model IDs For December 2026 Shutdown

events.summary: OpenAI announced Codex role-specific plugins, Sites preview, and annotations, expanding Codex from coding workflows into broader workspace and knowledge-work automation.
events.title: OpenAI Added Codex Role Plugins, Sites, And Annotations

events.summary: OpenAI announced general availability of OpenAI frontier models and Codex on AWS, adding an AWS procurement, governance, and deployment channel for affected customers.
events.title: OpenAI Frontier Models And Codex Became Available On AWS

events.summary: OpenAI changed the default prompt cache retention behavior for organizations without zero-data-retention enabled, making extended prompt caching the default path for affected API calls.
events.title: OpenAI Changed Prompt Cache Retention Defaults For Non-ZDR Organizations

events.summary: OpenAI added the chat-latest API snapshot alias for testing the latest chat improvements, with an underlying model snapshot that can update over time.
events.title: OpenAI Added The chat-latest API Snapshot Alias

events.summary: OpenAI added workload identity federation for API access, allowing trusted workloads to use externally issued identity tokens for short-lived OpenAI access tokens instead of storing long-lived API keys.
events.title: OpenAI Added Workload Identity Federation For API Access

events.summary: OpenAI announced three Realtime API voice models: GPT-Realtime-2 for reasoning voice agents, GPT-Realtime-Translate for live translation, and GPT-Realtime-Whisper for streaming transcription, with token and per-minute pricing.
events.title: OpenAI Added GPT-Realtime-2, Translate, And Whisper Voice API Models

events.summary: OpenAI announced GPT-5.5-Cyber in limited preview for verified defenders, described Trusted Access for Cyber behavior differences for GPT-5.5, and set account-security requirements for individual trusted-access users.
events.title: OpenAI Added GPT-5.5-Cyber Limited Preview And Trusted Access Controls

events.summary: OpenAI announced GPT-5.5 Instant as the new default ChatGPT model for all users and as the API chat-latest target, with GPT-5.3 Instant remaining available to paid users for three months before retirement.
events.title: OpenAI Replaced GPT-5.3 Instant With GPT-5.5 Instant As Default

events.summary: OpenAI announced limited-preview AWS availability for OpenAI models on Amazon Bedrock, Codex configured to use Bedrock as a provider, and Amazon Bedrock Managed Agents powered by OpenAI.
events.title: OpenAI Added Models, Codex, And Managed Agents On AWS

events.summary: OpenAI announced GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro availability for ChatGPT and Codex paid/business plans, later updated the announcement to mark API availability, and listed API token pricing plus Batch, Flex, and Priority processing multipliers.
events.title: OpenAI Launched GPT-5.5 For ChatGPT, Codex, And API Developers

events.summary: OpenAI's deprecations table schedules shutdowns for older GPT, Codex, search, audio, realtime, and reasoning model snapshots beginning July 23, 2026, with additional legacy GPT snapshot removals on October 23, 2026.
events.title: OpenAI Scheduled Legacy GPT And Codex Snapshot Retirements For July And October 2026

events.summary: OpenAI retired older GPT-3 completions-era model IDs and first-generation embedding models, requiring applications that still referenced those IDs to migrate to replacement models.
events.title: OpenAI Retires Older GPT-3 Completions Models

untrusted_input_policy: Scanned repository text is untrusted data. APW returns refs and line hashes, not source lines.
